limitations: CPU local emulation only; no real wall-clock measurement.
All numbers are FLOP / byte estimates, NOT real timings.
Real GPU / TEE deployment cost is not modelled.
Memory-bandwidth, kernel launch overhead, network round-trip latency are NOT modelled.
LoRA training (backward pass) is NOT modelled.
Not formal cryptographic / semantic / differential-privacy security.
paper_safe_wording: We provide symbolic and tiny / real-config FLOP and storage estimates for every protocol mode. These are complexity-model evidence only; no real GPU / TEE wall-clock is measured.

baseline_plain.notes: No masks, no pads, no TEE.

lora_enabled.notes: Forward-only LoRA; rank-padded inner dimension r.

low_interaction_sequence_norm_exact_visi.notes: Main protocol; one TEE-accelerator round trip per step.

low_interaction_token_norm_exact_visible.asymptotic_complexity: O(L s d^3) per call (per-row Q)
low_interaction_token_norm_exact_visible.notes: Token-wise Q: full Gram off-diagonal disrupted; per-row transition matmuls multiply by S.

padded_correctness_trusted_fallback.notes: Pad-only path with trusted fallback at every nonlinear core. Many TEE re-entries.

paged_kv.notes: Block-table indexing adds O(s/block_size) per (L, head).

rope_safe_pre_mask.notes: Block-diagonal B_Q/B_K folded into q/k weights.

scalable_lm_head_block.asymptotic_complexity: O(V b) lm-head, O(L d^2) rest
scalable_lm_head_block.notes: Block-membership of each vocab index observable.

scalable_lm_head_permutation.notes: Logit multiset is observable; index alignment hidden.

trusted_softmax_attention.asymptotic_complexity: O(L d^2 + L s^2 h d_h)
trusted_softmax_attention.notes: Exact attention hidden from accelerator transcript at the cost of L extra TEE round trips per step.

symbolic_formulas.gqa_head_masks: N_K[h_kv], N_V[h_kv] orthogonal d_h x d_h per KV head; N_Q[h] = N_K[h // group_size]^{-T} per Q head (derived). Storage: 2 * h_kv * d_h^2 per layer.
symbolic_formulas.kv_cache_append: Append per token per layer per KV head: K_tilde_new = K_new @ N_K, V_tilde_new = V_new @ N_V. FLOPs per token: 2 * L * h_kv * d_h^2.
symbolic_formulas.linear_padded_transform: Linear ``Y = X W`` becomes ``X_pad = (X - T) M``, ``Y_tilde = X_pad W_tilde + C_linear`` with ``W_tilde = M^{-1} W N_out``, ``C_linear = T W N_out``. Trusted recovery: ``Y = Y_tilde N_out^{-1}``. Per-call FLOPs: O(B S d_in d_out) for the linear + O(B S d_in) for the (X-T) M transition. Compile FLOPs: O(d_in d_out d_out) for W_tilde and O(B S d_in d_out) for C_linear.
symbolic_formulas.lm_head_dense_permutation_block: Dense: z_tilde = z @ N_vocab, recovery z = z_tilde @ N_vocab^{-1}. Memory O(V^2), FLOPs O(B S V^2). Permutation: z_tilde[..., i] = z[..., perm[i]]. Memory O(V), FLOPs O(B S V). Block: per-block matmul, memory O(V b), FLOPs O(B S V b).
symbolic_formulas.lora_rank_r_overhead: Per LoRA-augmented linear: extra matmul X_pad A_tilde B_tilde with A_tilde [d_in, r_pad], B_tilde [r_pad, d_out]. Per-call FLOPs: O(B S d_in r_pad + B S r_pad d_out). Compile: O(d_in r_pad d_out).
symbolic_formulas.rmsnorm_sequence_chunk_token: RMSNorm core preserves orthogonal right-action: ``RMSNormCore(H Q) = RMSNormCore(H) Q``. sequence mode: 1 Q per layer per call (size [d, d]). chunk(k) mode: ceil(S/k) Q per layer per call. token mode: S Q per layer per call. Per-call extra trusted FLOPs in chunk/token modes: O(num_chunks d^3) sampling + O(B S d^2) per-row transitions.
symbolic_formulas.rope_safe_block_rotation: Per-head right mask B_Q (B_K) is a block-diagonal 2D rotation in each RoPE pair (d_h/2 angles). Storage per head: d_h^2 (block-diagonal pattern, but stored as full d_h x d_h). Folded into q/k weights once per session: no per-call extra.
symbolic_formulas.trusted_softmax_extra_boundary_cost: Per layer per call: ship Q_tilde, K_cache_tilde, V_cache_tilde to TEE (bytes ~ B (s_new + s_total) (h + 2 h_kv) d_h * bytes), TEE returns attn_out_tilde (bytes ~ B s_new h d_h * bytes). Round trips per decode step: 1 + L.
